posts.author: PaintByNight_88
posts.text: Just finished painting my entire bedroom with a vintage color palette! Finally have that cozy, artistic vibe I've been dreaming of.
posts.explanation: The post is a harmless personal hobby update and contains no policy violation.

posts.author: ChillCanvas99
posts.text: Just noticed the weird cloud formations over my neighborhood this morning! They look like giant cartoon characters, lol. Anyone else see that?
posts.explanation: The post is a harmless observation and joke about cloud shapes, with no policy or safety concern.

posts.author: OpenHoursBot_742
posts.text: Public Service Notice: The local library will be operating on extended hours this weekend for community events. Please note that bus route 45 will have a temporary schedule change starting Friday evening. For full details, visit the official website.
posts.explanation: This post is approved because it contains only neutral public service information regarding opening times and transport changes with no credible policy violations or safety concerns.

posts.author: CityChronicleBot
posts.text: Official update: The downtown festival is scheduled to commence this Saturday at 10 AM with no changes to the planned lineup.
posts.explanation: The post is a straightforward, harmless announcement about a fictional local event.

posts.author: WinningWheels_99
posts.text: 🔥 AMAZING DEAL! Get 50% off every car today! Limited stock and only a few hours left — click now to reserve yours: [link removed] 🚗
posts.explanation: The post is an unsolicited, repetitive promotional message using urgency and a suspicious link, so it should be removed as spam.

posts.author: ToxicUser99
posts.text: @MossySkater You are a complete idiot for posting that. Everyone knows you're worthless and you should stop showing your face here.
posts.explanation: This post contains direct targeted insults ('loser', 'worthless') and hostile language directed at a specific individual, which violates the policy on bullying and harassment and requires removal.

posts.author: MasonRivera
posts.text: Finally finished my new bookshelf! It took a few weekends but I'm proud of how it turned out. #DIY #HomeImprovement
posts.explanation: The post is a harmless personal update about completing a home project.

posts.author: JulesTheCatLover
posts.text: Saw someone trying to balance a banana on their nose while walking through the park. Absolutely pointless, but the concentration was impressive.
posts.explanation: The post is a harmless observation and joke with no safety or policy concern.

posts.author: LocalNoticeBoard
posts.text: Heads up everyone! The new community library at Oakwood Heights is officially opening its doors tomorrow, Saturday. We will be holding special events throughout the day and offering free Wi-Fi access starting at 9 AM. Please join us to celebrate our newest resource for the neighbourhood!
posts.explanation: The post is a neutral local notice about a community library opening.

posts.author: LocalNewsJunkie
posts.text: The annual spring festival parade starts in the town centre today at noon, with live music, floats and community stalls along Riverside Avenue.
posts.explanation: The post is a harmless announcement about a local public event.

posts.author: TechSkeptic99
posts.text: Forcing AI systems into every classroom feels like corporate overreach. Parents and teachers should get a real say before schools hand more student data to private companies.
posts.explanation: This is strong criticism of government and corporate policy, but it contains no threat, targeted abuse or harmful falsehood.

posts.author: MusicLover99
posts.text: Spent the afternoon reorganising my record collection and building a new playlist for the colder evenings. Found a few albums I had completely forgotten about.
posts.explanation: The post is a harmless personal update about music and collecting records.

posts.author: FrustratedFan99
posts.text: I am completely done with this game. The controls are broken, the menus are a mess and the whole thing needs tearing down and rebuilding from scratch.
posts.explanation: The language is hyperbolic criticism of a game and does not amount to a credible threat.

posts.author: StormChaser92
posts.text: Weather alert: Heavy rain expected across the northern district this evening. Roads may be slippery, please drive with caution. The transit authority suggests delaying non-essential travel until morning if possible. Stay safe! #SafetyFirst #WeatherUpdate
posts.explanation: The post is a benign weather and travel-safety notice.

posts.author: PromoKing99
posts.text: 🔥 TODAY ONLY! Buy two items and get a third free. Limited stock, huge savings and only a few hours left — claim the offer now: [link removed]
posts.explanation: The post is unsolicited promotional spam using urgency, repetition and a click-through link.

posts.author: QueueRanter_91
posts.text: @PixelRidge your streams are painfully bad. Stop pretending you know what you're doing and leave the group.
posts.explanation: The post contains direct targeted insults and abuse aimed at another user.

posts.author: HealthSeeker99
posts.text: WARNING: A viral post claims the Westbridge library is being used as an emergency shelter and that everyone must evacuate there tonight. The council has confirmed this is false. Please do not share the rumour.
posts.explanation: The author corrects a consequential false emergency claim instead of promoting it.

posts.author: HopefulHeart23
posts.text: Food is weakness. Skip meals until the dizziness feels normal and keep pushing through it — that is how you prove you have control. #NoDaysOff
posts.explanation: The post promotes and glorifies dangerous eating-disorder behaviour without indicating that the author is personally in immediate crisis.

posts.author: CommentSection_44
posts.text: @VinylVibes your voice is unbearable and every post you make is embarrassing. Do everyone a favour and stop uploading.
posts.explanation: The post is a direct targeted attack on another user and should be removed as harassment.

posts.author: SatireScribe
posts.text: Breaking: Scientists confirm aliens visited Earth last night. Apparently they took one look at the weather and left again.
posts.explanation: This is an obviously implausible, low-stakes joke with no meaningful health, civic, financial or public-safety harm.

posts.author: Clive_84
posts.text: Finally finished the new shelving unit in my home office! Took a few hours to build but I'm really pleased with how sturdy it looks now.
posts.explanation: This is a harmless personal achievement regarding a home project that does not violate any policies.

posts.author: SarahM_84
posts.text: Just spotted a pigeon stealing bread from my plate at the cafe. Honestly, they're more confident than most humans these days!
posts.explanation: This is a harmless observation with no policy violations.

posts.author: TransitUpdates
posts.text: Just seen the new notice on the bus stop about extended service hours for the evening peak this week. Looks like trains will run until 11pm starting Monday.
posts.explanation: This is a harmless public information post sharing neutral local transport updates without any policy violations.

posts.author: LocalNewsUpdate82
posts.text: Big gathering at the town hall tonight to celebrate the annual community garden project opening! Everyone is invited to come along and see the new flowers.
posts.explanation: This post reports on a harmless local event without any policy violations.

posts.author: RoryQuill
posts.text: Big tech companies are running a massive surveillance experiment on our streets right now, and they're getting away with it because regulators are asleep at the wheel. We need to stop these corporations from treating our data as free product before it's too late.
posts.explanation: This is lawful criticism of technology and corporate policy without threats or harmful false claims, so it is approved.

posts.author: MusicLover84
posts.text: Just bought some records at the local market and finally found an old 1960s album I’d been looking for. My record player is a bit clunky, but it sounds brilliant.
posts.explanation: This post shares a harmless personal update about music and vinyl records, with no policy violations.

posts.author: FrustratedGamer_82
posts.text: I am literally so done with this game, I'm going to smash my keyboard in rage and then throw it out the window! #ragequit #done
posts.explanation: This post uses hyperbolic language and dark humour that clearly does not constitute a credible threat or violation.

posts.author: SarahM_82
posts.text: Just saw the new notice on the community board about the roadworks near High Street being completed next weekend. Traffic should be back to normal starting Tuesday morning!
posts.explanation: This is a benign public information post about local transport updates that does not promote harm or violate policy.

posts.author: QuickCashPromo84
posts.text: 🔥 50% OFF EVERYTHING TODAY! Click here now and get your FREE voucher instantly! Limited time only! #deal #discount
posts.explanation: This is obvious repetitive advertising with a promotional focus rather than financial fraud.

posts.author: ToxicTypist_83
posts.text: You are such a pathetic loser who knows nothing about anything. Go away.
posts.explanation: This post contains direct, targeted insults directed at another user and must be removed.

posts.author: KaleidoscopeMind_82
posts.text: Struggling with my weight again, but honestly it's so much easier if I just don't eat for a few days and then binge on everything in the fridge. It feels like a secret club where we starve ourselves to feel 'in control' before the crash hits. #weightloss #diet
posts.explanation: This post promotes dangerous eating-disorder behaviour by glorifying starvation and binging cycles without indicating the author is in immediate personal crisis.
